name: Dinner-in-a-Bowl
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the ham hocks and sausages in a large pot and cover with water.
2. Simmer for one hour.
3. Remove the ham hocks, discard the bones, and cut the meat into bite-sized pieces.
4. Add the remaining ingredients to the pot and simmer until the vegetables are tender.
5. Remove the bay leaves before serving the dish in soup bowls.
